meta.notes: Adversarial QA monitor. Update when Codex checks items done. Verify before accepting claims.

items.text: Replace stale 'Level 9 complete' language with master plan
Machine-readable level scorecard artifact
Verification command: local, GitHub, deployed, Docker, provider truth
Docs-truth check that fails when state files conflict
No-fake-data audit command for connectors, caches, fixtures
Proof ledger: tests run, e2e status, live provider status, revision
items.note: In level9-truth-report.json — CAVEAT: 1 provider failure unresolved

items.text: Rule: autonomous runs update this file only after code/test/runtime proof
Verify every primary experience route loads on hosted stack
Replace cached/static summaries with connector output or honest unavailable
Provider status visible per module (Google, Dexcom, Plaid, Weather…)
Calendar/email/news/social truth gaps closed
Home Assistant connected or explicitly unavailable with exact blocker
Daily actions round-trip through activity spine
Route/launch e2e checks with screenshots + console assertions
Realistic household day proven end-to-end
JARVIS-LEVEL3-EXIT-REPORT.md updated after live proof
Every mutation route audited for trust-zone enforcement
Every action through canonical taxonomy (family, risk, authority, audit)
Unknown/unauthenticated/suspended-zone cases fail closed everywhere
Negative-path tests for all hard-boundary families
Household-readable governance views (capabilities, blocks, approvals)
Child/privacy flows: parent review, tutoring boundaries, audit
Governance coverage report: every route/action with policy owner
Governance survives restart, provider outage, stale token, partial write
Full-duplex voice loop: wake, listen, speak, interrupt, resume, timeout
'Hey Jarvis' and 'Jarvis' wake phrases where surface allows
Siri/App Intents: Siri launches, JARVIS owns conversation + context
Browser/iPhone/hosted voice-shell parity
CarPlay: driving-safe, constrained commands, route-aware, safety tests
Real presence inputs: heartbeat, foreground/bg, focus, driving, room
Noise-learning feedback → future routing changes proven
Proactive orchestration across all signal sources (autonomous, not HTTP)
Every proactive prompt: why-now, source, confidence, snooze, audit
Ambient e2e proofs: quiet morning, urgent, driving, sabbath, crisis
Situation retrieval: person, domain, task, loop, season, lesson…
Retrieval explanations: why each memory was selected
Provenance on every durable memory (source, owner, sensitivity, state)
Corrected/retired/disputed memories EXCLUDED from converse() context
Chronicle is narrative memory layer (patterns, rituals, milestones)
Chronicle/JARVIS boundary enforced: faith-tagged routes to Chronicle
Household memory review UI: inspect, correct, dispute, retire, export
Obsidian/equivalent publishing for approved long-form notes
Memory e2e proofs: restart, permission, correction, export, narrative
Health check-ins/Dexcom/sleep wired into morning brief + Three Moves
Doctor packet from real accumulated health history (unavailable before N days)
Faith/ritual loops → daily word, prayer capture, Chronicle, guidance
Formation guidance changes by person/season/mode/health/stress
Child-safe tutoring: parent review, Socratic limits, inspectable transcripts
Parenting loops: rituals, encouragement, correction, child-sensitive privacy
'Formation changed because…' citations with named input facts
Formation e2e proofs: normal, recovery, school, sabbath, child, stale-prayer
Foundry generates real agent stubs: registry, mission, zone, tools, authority
Newborn-agent full lifecycle with audit (propose→retire)
Catalyst routing as first-class bounded domain (not generic fallback)
Flagship automation: research→draft→review→approval→publish with rollback
Sandbox snapshots before every execution + rollback packets
Pause/cancel/resume/dead-letter/retry/timeout on every autonomous job
Agent performance memory: success rate, violations, promotion evidence
Autonomous work proven in ≥3 domains
Constitution encoded into runtime decisions, not only docs
Recommendations cite principle, authority, uncertainty, dissent, override
Household modes change real behavior (proven, not just stored)
Value simulation for decisions across time/money/health/faith/family
Legacy archive as household product: stories, permissions, export
Monthly/seasonal/yearly reviews across all household domains
Prior lessons provably change current guidance
Household admin: modes, memory, devices, agents, emergency pause
Personnel/device continuity: new member, lost device, offboarding
Non-builder household views at appropriate responsibility levels
E2E scenario suite: crisis, travel, health, child, legacy, automation, correction, pause, provider-outage
Home control authority chosen & wired [EXCLUDED until HA adopted]
Weather provider live: no fake weather cards
Google Gmail/Calendar + Microsoft Outlook: token refresh + degraded states
Dexcom live sync with 'not worn recently' state
Plaid finance connector: configured, linked, synced, governed
KDP connector: credential safety, sync health, no unsafe publish
Perception feeds [EXCLUDED until hardware exists]
Workshop devices [EXCLUDED until network access exists]
Local-first resilience [OPTIONAL — Hetzner satisfies current need]
Live provider battery: configured/connected/stale/blocked/error per integration
Web: remove fake/stale provider signals from every experience
iPhone: Today/Focus/Family/Decisions/Navigate/Continuity reshape
Household-safe views for non-builder users
Settings paths for every connector and hardware dependency
Global unavailable/partial/stale/error/loading patterns consistent
Accessibility and responsive checks for all primary experiences
Manual verification scripts: web, iPhone, voice, provider surfaces
Level 9 scenario suite in integrated flows (not isolated stores)
Production smoke tests: API health, routes, connector, auth, mutations
Restart-survival tests: modes, agents, memory, rituals, provider sync
Browser e2e screenshots + console/network-noise checks
Apple contract + Swift decode verification for every /api/apple/* change
Security/permission regression tests for every L4+ action
Proof ledger updated before any checkbox → DONE
Maturity model, roadmap, exit reports updated only after proof passes

quality_concerns.title: Corrected memories not filtered in converse()
quality_concerns.detail: MemoryStore.correct_entry() marks approval_status='corrected'. MEMORY_EXCLUDED_FROM_REASONING exists. But _conversation_context_excerpt() in runtime.py calls profile_facts() without filtering excluded statuses. Corrected memories can still enter LLM context.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the line in runtime.py where profile_facts() or _conversation_context_excerpt() filters MEMORY_EXCLUDED_FROM_REASONING before injection.

quality_concerns.title: health_loop not wired into daily card or Three Moves
quality_concerns.detail: HealthLoopStore exists with check-in history. daily_stewardship.generate_three_moves() does not call it. The daily card is generic — it does not reflect whether Chris is depleted, sick, or at peak. L7.1 is the fix.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the import of HealthLoopStore in daily_stewardship.py and the line where check-in history shapes move generation.

quality_concerns.title: ritual_loop not wired into formation guidance
quality_concerns.detail: RitualSummaryStore exists. daily_stewardship.py does not import or call it. Rituals overdue, prayer stale, study incomplete — none of this reaches the daily card.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the import of RitualSummaryStore in daily_stewardship.py and where ritual status affects the day card.

quality_concerns.title: ProactiveOrchestrator is HTTP-poll only, not autonomous
quality_concerns.detail: ProactiveOrchestrator._collect_* methods work. But scheduler._tick() does not call orchestrator.run(). Proactive prompts are only created when someone hits GET /api/proactive/pending. JARVIS is not actually proactive.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the line in scheduler._tick() that calls the proactive orchestrator. Show a test that creates a prompt without any HTTP call.

quality_concerns.title: voice_ui.py is an HTML shell — no STT, TTS, or wake-word
quality_concerns.detail: voice_ui.py is ~18k lines of HTML/CSS/JS. render_voice_shell() returns a page. There is no speech-to-text, text-to-speech, wake-word detection, or interrupt handling anywhere in the module.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the STT implementation entry point (not a web API call to an external service — the actual receive-audio / transcribe path). Show a test that proves audio in → text out.

quality_concerns.title: Foundry approve does not generate an agent
quality_concerns.detail: POST /api/foundry/proposals/{id}/approve updates proposal status. It does not create an agent stub, register it in the agent registry, attach it to a trust zone, or make it schedulable. Approved proposals are inert.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show what happens after approve() is called: where is the agent stub created, where is it registered, where does the scheduler pick it up?

quality_concerns.title: constitution_engine.cite() only wraps chat — never blocks an action
quality_concerns.detail: ConstitutionEngine().cite() is called in converse() (chat endpoint). It is not called in assess_action_boundary(), plan_request(), scheduler._tick(), or any notification delivery path. Constitutional concerns produce narrative labels for chat but never change a real decision.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show one place outside converse() where a constitutional concern causes an action to be blocked or modified.

quality_concerns.title: value_simulator not in any decision routing path
quality_concerns.detail: ValueSimulator exists and is tested. It is only called from /api/decision/analyze and /api/simulate/compare-options. It is not consulted in assess_action_boundary(), plan_request(), or any scheduler decision. Value alignment is decorative.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show one production call path where ValueSimulator.compare() output changes which action is taken or recommended.

quality_concerns.title: AdaptationContextBuilder output is never consumed
quality_concerns.detail: AdaptationContextBuilder.build() is called in two service.py routes only. daily_stewardship.py, runtime.py, and scheduler.py do not import or call it. Per-person, per-mode, per-season formation cards are not real.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the import of AdaptationContextBuilder in daily_stewardship.py and where its health_focus/season_influence fields change the output.

quality_concerns.title: retrieve_by_situation() never called from converse()
quality_concerns.detail: converse() calls _conversation_context_excerpt() → _relevant_profile_facts() → profile_facts(). Keyword matching only. retrieve_by_situation() exists in memory.py but has zero callers in runtime.py. Situation-aware retrieval is API-only.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show where retrieve_by_situation() is called from converse() or any runtime reasoning path (not a service.py API handler).

quality_concerns.title: Provider truth gaps — fake/cached data in live experiences
quality_concerns.detail: Weather, calendar, email, news, and social modules may render cached, static, or fallback data as real household activity. No systematic audit of which connectors are live vs. silently falling back exists.
quality_concerns.codex_check: For each module (Weather, Calendar, Email, News, Social): show the path that fires when the provider token is missing/expired. Does it show 'unavailable' or does it show fake/cached data?

quality_concerns.title: SQLite index not used by main decision loop
quality_concerns.detail: SQLiteIndex is wired to service.py API endpoints only. runtime.py, scheduler.py, and apple_api.py all read from JSON/JSONL. The hybrid index is cold — it doesn't accelerate or change any real decision.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show one production call path where SQLiteIndex.query_*() is used instead of loading the full JSON file.

quality_concerns.title: CarPlay routing checks exist but not in delivery path
quality_concerns.detail: carplay_action_check() exists in apple_api.py. _choose_delivery_mode() does not consult CarPlay context. Driving-safe constraints are not enforced during real notification routing.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show where _choose_delivery_mode() or the notification delivery path checks whether the user is driving before deciding to interrupt.

quality_concerns.title: daily_stewardship not scheduled — API-triggered only
quality_concerns.detail: daily_stewardship.py has morning checkin and evening review endpoints. scheduler._tick() does not call them. Health day cards and formation prompts are only generated when the app polls the API.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Show the scheduler._tick() call that fires morning_checkin or equivalent at the appropriate time of day.

quality_concerns.title: Archived historical notes conflict with master plan
quality_concerns.detail: JARVIS-SESSION-STATE.md archived section says GAP-4 'PARTIALLY RESOLVED', GAP-8 'PARTIALLY RESOLVED', GAP-9 'RESOLVED' etc. These conflict with the master plan items. A future autonomous session may act on stale archived status.
quality_concerns.codex_check: Ensure the archived section is clearly marked 'superseded — do not act on' and no autonomous session uses archived GAP statuses as current state.
